placementGroups.placementRule: Attach to existing building entry faces only. No gameplay anchor movement.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Strengthen entry silhouette at quarter-view scale.
placementGroups.notes: Prefer 1 primary entrance per visible first-screen building.

placementGroups.placementRule: Apply only to major visible wall faces. Avoid repetitive spam.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Break large wall masses into readable openings without tiny detail clutter.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use as low-count silhouette blocker, not forest fill.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Hide test-map edge and support grounded skyline breakup.

placementGroups.placementRule: Align to existing notice interaction anchor only.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Make first objective unmistakable without changing gameplay logic.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use short repeated segments to define edges. No broad enclosure redesign.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Quietly segment space and reduce open test-plane feel.
placementGroups.notes: Validate modular snapping before widespread use.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use in very small counts near service walls or corners.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Support grounded survival utility language without clutter.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use as route readability marker only if scale and emissive are under control.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Guide player movement and support place identity.

placementGroups.placementRule: Cluster in 1-3 count groups near service walls.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Add believable supply language without clutter.
placementGroups.notes: Future asset; likely mapped from current crate ZIP.

placementGroups.placementRule: Place behind primary play route or beside service structures.
Use only where a low blocker is needed. Avoid militarizing the scene.
Silhouette-based guidance only; no dependence on readable text.
Attach to entry-facing walls only. No building footprint changes.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Make entrances read as intentional places.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use on selected camera-facing windows only.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Strengthen opening silhouette with larger readable forms.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use only where it materially improves entrance readability.
placementGroups.readabilityGoal: Avoid flat box-door look without trim spam.

placementGroups.placementRule: Use only if visible from camera and not noisy.
